Welcome to Dontia Care Clinic

your one-stop destination for a radiant smile and timeless beauty!

About Dontia Care Clinic
Highly Trained Professionals

Changing Lives One Smile At A Time!

Founded in 2001, Dontia Dental, Skin & ENT Care Clinic is Kolkata’s premier destination for advanced dental, dermatological, and ENT treatments — all under one trusted name. We bring together the best of three specialized fields to deliver comprehensive care with precision, compassion, and cutting-edge technology.

 

As the only Dawson Academy-trained dentist in Eastern India, Dontia is widely recognized for smile design, dental implants, root canals, braces, and more — performed by a team of top dentists in Kolkata using state-of-the-art equipment and techniques.

 

In addition to world-class dentistry, our Skin Care Division offers a full range of personalized aesthetic treatments, including acne management, anti-aging therapies, laser hair reduction, PRP, fillers, and exclusive Korean glass skin facials — all designed to enhance your natural beauty safely and effectively.

 

Our ENT specialists provide expert diagnosis and treatment for a wide spectrum of ear, nose, and throat conditions, ensuring optimal care for both acute and chronic ENT issues in adults and children.

 

With an unwavering focus on safety, precision, and patient satisfaction, Dontia is where science meets artistry — creating brighter smiles, healthier skin, and better overall well-being every day.

Latest Technology

Intraoral Scanner

Intraoral Scanner

A lightweight, user-friendly device featuring one-click scanning and versatile tips, delivering precise and efficient digital impressions for dentistry.

Aquacare Air Abrasion

Aquacare Air Abrasion

It allows for contact-free, minimally invasive dentistry, making procedures painless.

Baldus

Baldus

Compact, secure, and easy-to-use nitrous oxide sedation unit for patient comfort.

Dental Laser

Dental Laser

Dental lasers use concentrated light to remove or shape tissue during procedures.

Why Dontia Care Clinic the best dental and skin clinic in Kolkata?

At Dontia Care Clinic, as the dental & skin clinic in Kolkata, we blend cutting-edge technology with compassionate, patient-centered treatment to deliver exceptional dental care. Established in 2001 and recognized as Eastern India’s only Dawson Academy-certified clinic, our expert team is dedicated to creating healthy, confident smiles with precision, integrity, and global standards of excellence

Highly Trained Team

Our expert are internationally trained and committed to delivering precise, ethical, and compassionate care.

Advanced Technology & Techniques

Equipped with Cutting edge equipments and modern treatment protocols for accurate and painless procedures.

Safe, Hygienic & Comfortable Environment

We follow international sterilization protocols to ensure your safety and comfort throughout your visit.

Guaranteed Results

We provide personalized care plans tailored to your unique needs and comfort.

Dawson Academy Certified

The only dental clinic in Eastern India recognized by the prestigious Dawson Academy (Florida), ensuring global clinical standards

Over 20 Years of Trusted Service

Serving smiles since 2001 with a legacy of quality and patient satisfaction.Over two decades of trusted dental excellence and patient satisfaction.

Personalized & Compassionate Care

Each patient is treated with warmth, empathy, and customized treatment plans tailored to individual needs.

Our Gallery

Still Have Doubts?
1. What services does Dontia Care Clinic offer?

We offer a full range of Dental, Skin & ENT services including smile correction, dental implants, braces, root canal treatment, gum therapy, cosmetic dentistry, and preventive care.

2. Is Dontia Care Clinic safe and hygienic?

Absolutely. We follow strict international sterilization protocols and maintain a fully sanitized environment for every patient visit.

3. Do you offer painless treatments?

Yes, we use advanced technology and gentle techniques for a pain-free experience. We’re known as the Best Dental Clinic in Kolkata for Pain-Free Treatments, offering meticulously planned care.

4. What specialists available here ?

1.Dentists
2.ENT surgeons
3.Dermatologists and skin care therapists
4. TMD/ TMJ Specialist

5. How do I book an appointment?

You can book an appointment by calling us directly or filling out the appointment form on our website. Walk-ins are welcome but subject to availability.

6. What makes Dontia different from other clinics?

As the leading dental clinic in Kolkata, we bring 20+ years of trusted care, advanced technology, expert dentists, and a patient-centered approach for lifelong oral health.
